items: Clone a git repository right inside the app and start a session on it. The clone runs in the background so the app stays responsive — a placeholder folder with a progress bar appears immediately — and the new session opens on the repository's default branch.
Schedule an agent to launch on a repeating cadence, not just once, so recurring work kicks off on its own.
Each session now has a "…" options menu gathering its per-session actions in one place.
Claude agents can automatically continue once the five-hour usage limit resets, so long-running work picks back up on its own — with a per-agent switch to opt any individual agent out.
Tidied the sidebar's background right-click menu and moved Clone Repo alongside New folder so it's easier to find.
The schedule-session action row now stays on a single, stable line instead of shifting as you fill it in.
Small polish to the auto-continue menu item so its checkmark reads more clearly.
A recurring session set to start "now" launches immediately and no longer leaves behind duplicate or empty ghost panels.
Fixed a stray "C" character that could appear in the input line of a freshly-started session on Windows.
